category_sources: Official QuestDB docs describe QuestDB as an open source time-series database engineered for low latency.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use the name QuestDB.
docs_sources: Official QuestDB documentation introduction states it covers QuestDB Open Source and Enterprise.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/questdb/questdb; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official QuestDB docs describe low-latency time-series storage and SQL extensions.
Official QuestDB homepage mentions SQL, PostgreSQL wire compatibility, and time-series ingestion.
